title: LegacyWorkloadStaged
content:
# LegacyWorkloadStaged


## Properties

- **ready** (`boolean`): Staged workload ready to be applied.
- **app_version** (`string`): Version Number of the Kelvin App used for the Staged Workload.
- **payload** (`object`): Internal Kelvin configuration information for deployment of the Staged Workload.
- **instantly_apply** (`boolean`): Whether the staged workload should be instantly applied or not.
- **status** (`object`): Realtime information about the Staged Workload as seen from the Cloud.
summary: Object with properties: ready, app_version, payload, instantly_apply, status

ready.description: Staged workload ready to be applied.

app_version.description: Version Number of the Kelvin App used for the Staged Workload.

payload.description: Internal Kelvin configuration information for deployment of the Staged Workload.

instantly_apply.description: Whether the staged workload should be instantly applied or not.

status.description: Realtime information about the Staged Workload as seen from the Cloud.

warnings.description: All warnings received for any Staged Workload operations.
